title: Chrysocyathus nepalensis

The exact classification of this species is still being researched, but it is generally classified under the genus Chrysocyathus. The Arecaceae family includes over 2,600 species of palms, ranging from the small, shrub-like plants to the large, tree-like species. Chrysocyathus nepalensis is a type of palm tree that is adapted to the mountainous regions of Nepal.
